title: Millisecond UI
body:
# Millisecond UI

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-%235865F2.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/MyqR2Wc6sd)

### What does this pack do?
This pack changes the UI elements of Minecraft to more minimalistic Versions with flat colors and rounded edges.

### What versions are supported?
1.21 and newer are recomended but it should work on older version too (not tested!)
